questions.question: 11 (a) Americium (Am) is a radioactive isotope. A nucleus of americium contains 95 protons and 146 neutrons. It decays by emitting an α‑particle to form a nucleus of an isotope of neptunium (Np). Write down the nuclide equation for the decay of americium to neptunium.
